examples: Drive 30 minutes, and you come to the leafy, green suburb of Constantia.
Born in Dorset, United Kingdom, Douglas-Hamilton grew up in Constantia, Cape Town, South Africa, but moved to Scotland as a teen.
The oldest estate in the country, Groot Constantia (+27 21 794 5128) has lanes of leafy oaks, a manor house and a vast selection of great wines.
Eight vineyards in the Constantia Valley are open to the public.
The area became a British colony in 1814, but earlier Dutch colonists introduced vines to the Constantia Valley in 1685, making it the oldest winemaking region in the world outside of Europe.
